state_snapshot.overall_goal: Refine camera interaction and UI parity in the AliceViewer framework (v2.0.1) while maintaining strict build and workspace standards.
state_snapshot.active_constraints: - **File Placement:** Headers in `../include/`, Implementation in `../src/`. - **Interaction:** Camera movement must be blocked by `ImGui::GetIO().WantCaptureMouse` only when hovering UI. - **Camera Logic:** - Orbit: `ALT + LMB`. - Pan: `MMB` (reassigned from orbit). - Zoom: `ALT + RMB Drag` and `Scroll Wheel`. - **Sketch Safety:** `mousePress` in `sketch.cpp` must ignore `LMB` if `ALT` is held to prevent point placement during orbit.
state_snapshot.key_knowledge: - **Build Pipeline:** Using Ninja located in `AppData` for `cmake --build` equivalent. - **Camera Mapping:** - Orbit: `yaw` and `pitch` updated by `ALT + LMB` drag. - Pan: `focusPoint` translated relative to camera axes via `MMB` drag. - Zoom: `distance` adjusted by `ALT + RMB` Y-delta or `MouseWheel`. - **Input Handling:** `glfwGetKey` and `glfwGetMouseButton` used within `ArcballCamera::update` to differentiate multi-modal mouse inputs.
state_snapshot.artifact_trail: - `src/AliceViewer.cpp`: Updated `ArcballCamera::update` with the new input map (ALT+LMB, MMB, ALT+RMB). - `src/sketch.cpp`: Updated `setup()` help text; added `!isAlt` check to `mousePress()` to isolate point placement from orbit. - `build/AliceViewer.exe`: Successfully recompiled via Ninja; validated link phase.
state_snapshot.file_system_state: - CWD: `C:\Users\shajay.b.ZAHA-HADID\source\repos\AliceViewer_Scaffold` - HEADERS: `include/AliceViewer.h` - SOURCES: `src/AliceViewer.cpp` (Updated), `src/sketch.cpp` (Updated), `src/main.cpp` - BUILD: `build/AliceViewer.exe` (Latest build successful)
state_snapshot.recent_actions: - UPDATE: Re-mapped camera controls in `AliceViewer.cpp` (Orbit: Alt+LMB, Pan: MMB, Zoom: Alt+RMB/Scroll). - UPDATE: Synchronized `sketch.cpp` help text and input logic to prevent accidental point creation during orbit. - EXEC: Rebuilt project with Ninja to verify compilation and linkage.
state_snapshot.task_state: 1. [DONE] Re-map Camera Orbit to Alt+LMB. 2. [DONE] Re-map Camera Pan to MMB. 3. [DONE] Implement Zoom via Alt+RMB Drag. 4. [DONE] Update Sketch help text and interaction safety. 5. [READY] Framework ready for manual verification of new interaction map.
